claim: Tier 7.7f reran the locked long-run scoreboard using the repaired NARMA10 U(0,0.2) stream and produced a valid finite-stream classification: mackey_only_localized. Mackey-Glass persisted across 8000/16000/32000, while Lorenz stayed flat/weak, repaired NARMA10 stayed near-flat, and ESN remained the best external baseline.
caveat: Scoring evidence only; not a baseline freeze, not hardware/native evidence, not broad public usefulness, not external-baseline superiority, and not permission to mix repaired U(0,0.2) NARMA scores with prior U(0,0.5) NARMA scores.
